Class JPATabProvider

java.lang.Object
org.openxava.tab.impl.TabProviderBase
org.openxava.tab.impl.JPATabProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, IDataReader, ISearch, ITabProvider
public class JPATabProvider extends TabProviderBase
An ITabProvider that obtain data via JPA.

Author:
Javier Paniza

    • nextChunk

      public DataChunk nextChunk() throws RemoteException
      Description copied from interface: IDataReader
      Obtain the next data chunk.

      This method can be call from a TableModel to obtain data on demand.

      Throws:
      RemoteException
